description: Kyle from Hedgehog Markets discusses their development of permissionless prediction markets on Solana, focusing on user experience and market types including AMM, Parimutuel, and PVP markets.
topic_summary: Hedgehog Markets is building permissionless prediction markets on Solana, aiming for a user-friendly interface and multiple market types, including AMM and Parimutuel, with upcoming PVP markets [t=8:24].
